name: MoneyGram
description_short: Portland, OR's MoneyGram at 7404 N Interstate Ave provides check cashing and money transfer services daily from 7 AM to 11 PM.
description_long:
The MoneyGram location on N Interstate Ave in Portland, OR operates as a standalone check-cashing and money services center. Open 7 days a week from 7 AM to 11 PM, this Portland spot is convenient for both early morning and late evening financial needs. The address is 7404 N Interstate Ave, making it easily accessible to North Portland residents.

This Portland MoneyGram branch specializes in check cashing and money transfers. You can call them at 503-286-6751 to ask about specific services, processing times, or fees. Staff can help with domestic and international money transfer services.

If you're in North Portland and need to cash a check or send money quickly, this N Interstate Ave location is open late for your convenience. Bring a valid government-issued ID, which is required for check cashing. MoneyGram provides a reliable financial services option for your needs.
pros: Extensive network of partner locations including CVS, Walmart, and Ace Cash Express providing broad geographic accessibility
Extended operating hours at many locations (until 8-10 PM), accommodating customers with limited availability
Dual access channels: both online/digital transfers and in-person walk-in service
Multiple Portland-area locations (at least 5 Ace Cash Express partners listed in Oregon alone)
Established brand with long operational history in money transfer industry
Both domestic and international money transfer capability
Available at non-bank retail locations, accessible to unbanked and underbanked consumers
cons: No branded company locations—service depends entirely on third-party retailers' training and customer service quality
Website provides zero transparency on fees, exchange rates, transfer speeds, or service terms
Limited control over partner location hours, availability, or service consistency across network
No specific information about transfer limits, hold periods, or delivery methods
Reliance on retail partners may result in variable customer experience and inconsistent service quality
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who need walk-in money transfer access at convenient retail locations
Customers sending international remittances who value established brand reputation
People without access to traditional banking services seeking domestic money transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need accessible, walk-in money transfer services through convenient retail locations rather than dedicated offices. The primary caveat is that service quality, fees, and speed are entirely dependent on third-party partner retailers, and the company's website lacks transparent pricing or service term disclosure, making cost comparison difficult before visiting a location.
services: Partner location search and finder tool
meta_description: Portland, OR MoneyGram at 7404 N Interstate Ave offers check cashing and money transfers, open 7 AM-11 PM daily.
